title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・収まらねえ熱

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One pulls out all the stops at the spring
Tenno Sho. While the audience is clearly stunned
by her performance, she isn't as excited about her
victory as usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's only just begun climbing to the peak of the
centrals now. A tense air settles over her as she
sets her sights on the Takarazuka Kinen next.
